Order Retractor Lite 24 Hardware for Professional Trade Show & Event Display

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware provides a complete portable display solution for professional trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations. This lightweight aluminum retractor stand system delivers reliable banner display capabilities with easy setup and professional presentation quality.

Professional Display Features

  • Lightweight Aluminum Construction: Durable 5.25lb base provides stability while remaining portable for frequent transport
  • Dual Swivel Feet: Two adjustable feet ensure stable positioning on various floor surfaces
  • Shock Cord Pole System: Quick-connect poles make assembly and breakdown simple for busy trade show schedules
  • Professional Black Finish: Sleek black hardware complements any custom banner design
  • Compact Storage: 24.62" W x 83.5" H x 11" D dimensions fit standard trade show booth spaces

Custom Banner Compatibility

This retractor hardware accommodates custom banners up to 24 inches wide, making it ideal for promotional displays, product announcements, and brand messaging at trade shows, retail locations, and corporate events.

Trade Show Display Applications

Perfect for trade show booths, retail promotions, lobby displays, conference presentations, and any professional environment requiring portable banner display solutions with quick setup capabilities.

Retractor Lite 24 Hardware Material & Construction Specifications

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware features premium materials selected for durability, portability, and professional trade show display requirements.

Aluminum Base Construction

Lightweight aluminum construction provides the optimal balance of durability and portability. The aluminum base resists corrosion and maintains professional appearance through repeated trade show use while keeping total weight to just 5.25 pounds for easy transport.

Shock Cord Pole System

Internal shock cord system connects pole segments automatically during setup, eliminating loose parts and ensuring quick, reliable assembly. The shock cord maintains tension for secure pole connection while allowing compact storage when disassembled.

Dual Swivel Foot Design

Two swivel feet provide stable positioning on various floor surfaces commonly found at trade shows, retail locations, and corporate environments. The swivel design adapts to uneven surfaces while maintaining professional display positioning.

Professional Black Finish

Durable black finish provides professional appearance that complements any custom banner design. The finish resists scratches and maintains appearance through frequent setup and transport cycles.

Banner Attachment Hardware

Snap rail top attachment system and banner tape bottom mounting provide secure banner installation without tools. This dual-attachment system ensures banner remains taut and professionally displayed throughout your event.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Assembly & Setup Instructions for Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware features tool-free assembly designed for quick setup at trade shows and professional events.

Initial Assembly Process

Connect pole segments using the internal shock cord system. The shock cord automatically aligns and secures pole connections, eliminating the need for separate hardware or tools during assembly.

Base Setup & Positioning

Position the aluminum base in your desired display location. Adjust the dual swivel feet to ensure stable positioning on your floor surface. The base dimensions of 24.62" W x 11" D provide stable support while fitting standard trade show booth spaces.

Banner Installation Method

Attach your custom banner using the snap rail system at the top and banner tape at the bottom. The snap rail provides secure top attachment while the banner tape system ensures proper bottom tension for professional display appearance.

Height Adjustment

The assembled display reaches 83.5" in height, providing optimal visibility for trade show and retail environments. This height accommodates standard banner designs while maintaining professional presentation proportions.

Breakdown & Storage

Disassemble by removing the banner and disconnecting pole segments. The shock cord system keeps pole segments organized during storage. The compact breakdown size facilitates easy transport between events.

Transport Considerations

At 5.25 pounds total weight, the hardware transports easily in standard trade show cases or vehicle storage. The aluminum construction withstands frequent transport while maintaining professional functionality.

Production & Turnaround Times for Retractor Hardware Orders

Choose from flexible production timeframes to meet your trade show and event scheduling requirements. All production times are calculated in business days from order completion and artwork approval.

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal when you need retractor hardware quickly for upcoming trade shows or last-minute display requirements. Express production ensures your hardware ships within 2 business days of order completion.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day rush available in select cases
  • Production time begins when artwork approval is complete
  • Contact customer service for emergency rush availability

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production timeframe provides excellent turnaround speed for most trade show and event planning schedules. Standard production is included at no additional charge.

  • Free standard production timeline
  • Suitable for most trade show planning schedules
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Production begins upon artwork approval completion

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option when you're planning ahead and can accommodate a longer production timeline. Saver production offers reduced pricing for advance planning.

  • Reduced pricing for extended production timeline
  • Perfect for advance trade show planning
  • Same quality standards as express production
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day

Production Timeline Notes

Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping transit time. Production begins when order details are complete and any required approvals are received. Contact customer service for specific timeline questions or rush requirements.

Trade Show & Convention Display

Banner Design Requirements for Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

Ensure optimal display results by following these banner specifications and design guidelines for use with Retractor Lite 24 Hardware.

Banner Size Specifications

Design custom banners up to 24 inches wide to fit the retractor hardware specifications. Banner height can accommodate various lengths while maintaining proper display tension through the snap rail and banner tape attachment system.

Design File Requirements

Submit artwork in high-resolution formats suitable for professional printing. Vector files or high-resolution raster images ensure crisp text and graphics when displayed on the retractor hardware system.

Attachment Area Considerations

Account for snap rail attachment at the top and banner tape attachment at the bottom when designing your banner. Ensure important design elements remain visible and are not obscured by the attachment hardware.

Color & Contrast Guidelines

Optimize banner designs for visibility in trade show and retail environments. High contrast colors and readable fonts ensure your message remains effective under various lighting conditions typically found at professional events.

Material Compatibility

The retractor hardware accommodates various banner materials suitable for the snap rail and banner tape attachment system. Consult with customer service regarding material selection for optimal display performance.

Proof & Approval Process

Digital proofs available to verify banner design appearance before production. The proof process ensures your banner design will display correctly on the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware and meets your professional presentation requirements.

Design Assistance

Professional design services available to create custom banners optimized for retractor display use. Design assistance ensures your banner maximizes the professional presentation capabilities of the hardware system.

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

What banner sizes work with Retractor Lite 24 Hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners up to 24 inches wide. Banner height can vary based on your display needs while maintaining proper tension through the snap rail top attachment and banner tape bottom mounting system.

How much does the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware weigh?

The complete hardware system weighs 5.25 pounds, making it easily portable for trade shows and events. The lightweight aluminum construction provides durability while maintaining easy transport capability.

Do I need tools to assemble the retractor hardware?

No tools required. The shock cord pole system connects automatically during assembly, and the dual swivel feet adjust by hand. Banner attachment uses the snap rail and banner tape system without requiring additional hardware.

Can I ship retractor hardware directly to a trade show venue?

Yes, we can ship directly to convention centers and trade show venues. Contact customer service to arrange direct shipping and ensure compliance with venue receiving requirements and timing restrictions.

What production times are available for retractor hardware orders?

Choose from 2-day express, 3-day standard (free), or 5-day saver production timeframes. Express and rush options available for urgent trade show requirements. Production begins when order details are complete.

Is the retractor hardware available in colors other than black?

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware is available in professional black finish only. The black finish provides professional appearance that complements various banner designs and trade show environments.

Can I reorder banner hardware for multiple trade show displays?

Yes, establish a business account for simplified reordering and enhanced payment terms. Business accounts provide order history and streamlined purchasing for multiple trade show events and display requirements.

What banner materials work best with this retractor hardware?

Various banner materials are compatible with the snap rail and banner tape attachment system. Contact customer service for material recommendations based on your specific display environment and durability requirements.
